name: Guan Yu

skills.name: Rider of Triumph
skills.description:
Normal Stance: Moving constantly accumulates a Movement Speed bonus, and reaching a certain distance activates the Charge Stance.
Charge Stance: Enhances the next skill and Basic Attack.

skills.name: Heroic Charge
skills.description:
Normal Stance: Deals damage to enemies within range.
Charge Stance: Charges forward, knocking back enemies in his path while dealing damage.

skills.name: Soaring Green Dragon
skills.description:
Normal Stance: Removes crowd control effects and gains Movement Speed.
Charge Stance: Removes crowd control effects and leaps forward, knocking back enemies within the landing area and dealing damage.

skills.name: Razor Cavalry
skills.description:
Normal Stance: Enhances himself, reducing the movement distance required to enter Charge stance.
Charge Stance: Summons heavy cavalry that dash forward, dealing damage and knocking back enemies in their path.

skillsZh.name: 一騎當千
skillsZh.description:
普通姿態：保持移動會持續累積移速加成，移動固定距離後進入衝鋒姿態。
衝鋒狀態：下次技能和普攻獲得強化。

skillsZh.name: 單刀赴會
skillsZh.description:
普通姿態：對自身周圍一定範圍內敵人造成傷害。
衝鋒姿態：向面朝方向衝鋒，擊退沿途敵人並造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 青龍偃月
skillsZh.description:
普通姿態：解除所受到的控制，並獲得額外移速。
衝鋒姿態：解除所受到的控制，向面朝方向進行跳躍，擊退落地範圍內的敵人並造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 刀鋒鐵騎
skillsZh.description:
強化自身，期間減少進入衝鋒姿態所需要的移動距離。
衝鋒姿態：召喚鐵騎與自身向面朝方向突進，對沿途敵人造成傷害和擊退效果。

tips: Guan Yu (Warrior): Tier B — 46.23% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Frigid Charge, Dragon's Rage, Succubus Cloak.
tipsZh: 關羽（對抗路）：梯度 B，勝率 46.23%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：冰霜衝擊、怒龍劍盾、魔女斗篷.

faqs.question: Is Guan Yu good in current season?
faqs.answer: Guan Yu is Tier B Warrior with 46.23% win rate, 0.37% pick rate, and 0.09% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Guan Yu build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Frigid Charge, Dragon's Rage, Succubus Cloak, Overlord's Platemail, Sage's Sanctuary, Blood Rage.

faqs.question: How to counter Guan Yu?
faqs.answer: Pick Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun. Strong into Daji, Mi Yue, Yixing.

faqsZh.question: 關羽 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 關羽 為 B 梯度，勝率 46.23%、選取 0.37%、禁用 0.09%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 關羽 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：冰霜衝擊、怒龍劍盾、魔女斗篷、霸者重裝、賢者的庇護、血魔之怒.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 關羽？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Hou Yi、Marco Polo、Lady Sun。關羽 克制 Daji、Mi Yue、Yixing。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Daji, Mi Yue, Yixing. Weak into: Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Daji、Mi Yue、Yixing；被克制：Hou Yi、Marco Polo、Lady Sun

guide.overview: Guan Yu is a Medium Warrior (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 48.3% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Guan Yu: '''Normal Stance:''' Moving constantly accumulates a Movement Speed bonus, and reaching a certain distance activates the Charge Stance.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Fortitude, Axe of Torment, Cuirass of Savagery, then complete Frigid Charge, Succubus Cloak, Starbreaker. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Guan Yu's Warrior kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Heroic Charge → Soaring Green Dragon → Razor Cavalry → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Razor Cavalry (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Heroic Charge, and Razor Cavalry on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Heroic Charge → Soaring Green Dragon → Razor Cavalry → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Flank or dive backline after tanks commit. Do not start fights without vision on enemy jungler.
guide.highRank: Guan Yu sits at Tier B globally (48.3% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Below 49% global WR — high-rank players often avoid unless compensating for team comp.
comparisons: Guan Yu vs Li Xin (Warrior, Tier S+): Li Xin is 1.9% pick / 52.6% WR. Li Xin wins 4.3% more often globally. Choose Guan Yu when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Li Xin for Clash Lane comfort.
Guan Yu vs Chicha (Warrior, Tier S): Chicha is 1.5% pick / 50.2% WR. Chicha wins 1.9% more often globally. Choose Guan Yu when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Chicha for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Guan Yu excels into Daji, Mi Yue, Yixing. Avoid blind picking into Hou Yi, Marco Polo, Lady Sun without team peel.
